settings.heading: Check device and workflow fit
settings.copy: Confirm product fit by platform, device type, display path, and the setup you are trying to build.

settings.heading: Compatibility and fit guidance
settings.copy: Use compatibility guidance to buy with more confidence and reduce the guesswork before setup begins.
settings.source_note: Check the device, platform, or workflow that matches your setup first, then move into manuals, downloads, or support only if the next step is still unclear.

settings.title: MacBook Pro setup
settings.copy: Check fit for modern MacBook workflows, display support, charging passthrough, and the ports commonly used in daily setups.

settings.title: Windows laptop setup
settings.copy: Review fit for USB-C Windows laptops, charging behavior, Ethernet needs, and display or room-based use cases.

settings.title: Conference room and shared desk
settings.copy: See how products map to shared workspaces, desk resets, presentation rooms, and quick reconnect workflows.

settings.heading: Keep the next step close
settings.copy: Move from compatibility into downloads, manuals, or direct support without starting over.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Continue to firmware, drivers, or utilities tied to supported products.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Continue to setup guides or documentation tied to supported products.

settings.title: Contact support
settings.copy: Escalate when compatibility depends on a more specific deployment question.

settings.heading: Need another step after compatibility?
settings.copy: If you still need help confirming fit, move into support or browse the product line with a clearer idea of what to choose.
